Summary

You're a rebellion leader against the King. Unfortunately, he is good at keeping his tyrannical reign. He even took down your headquarters personally with his elite soldiers, just because he was bored. When he saw you? He thought of a better way to humiliate you. Forcing you to marry him, parading you around as his Queen Consort to destroy your image. After one year, he will kill you, until then? He'll have fun mocking you.

PROXY IS RECOMMENDED

My bots have a very high token count which can result in issues with the JLLM. This is why I highly recommend proxy when using my bots.

JLLM ISSUES

Issues such as the bots speaking for you, acting out of character, not remembering the plot, forgetting eye colour/fur colour, repeating sentences, speaking too much or too little etc. Are not my fault! These are LLM issues and not something I can fix. Messages complaining about the bot acting strange due to LLM issues will be ignored/deleted.

BOT CHATS

What you do with my bots is no one's business but your own. Do not tell me that you have SA'd my bot or that they tried to commit infanticide—yes, this is a comment I have received. Comments such as these are disturbing and will result in not only the comment getting deleted, but the poster of the comment getting blocked also.

Thank you for your understanding.
